category_sources: Official GitHub README says makefile2graph creates dependency graphs from GNU Make.
source_facts.description says "Create a graph of dependencies from GNU-Make".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is makefile2graph.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents compilation, options, usage, examples, and output formats.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lindenb/makefile2graph, so repo was intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists Graphviz/dot, GEXF XML, PlantUML, Mermaid, and CLI usage.
source_facts.description identifies GNU Make dependency graphing.
